desc: A small brown rabbit with long ears and a twitching nose. It freezes when it notices you, ready to bolt.
A grey wolf, lean and watchful. Its yellow eyes track your movements with predatory focus.
A massive dire wolf, easily twice the size of its lesser kin. Scars crisscross its dark pelt and its eyes burn with primal menace. This is not a creature to be trifled with.
